b_agg.description: Brick Agg: The Brick Raw tables are aggregated to elimanate duplicates.

b_raw.description: Brick Raw: The importable Excel Sheets entering the database

b_vld.description: Brick Valid: The Brick Agg tables filtered to correct datatypes.

h_agg.description: Populated by aggregated Heard Raw tables. Nabu number conversions take place here.

h_vld.description: Populated by aggregated and Nabu changed Heard Agg tables

s_agg.description: Populated by aggregated Sound Raw dimen data (elimanate duplicates). Translate Core data is validated then used to translate non-Translate dimen data

s_raw.description: The Brick Valid data is seperated by column into dimen data such as person_planunit and moment_budunit

s_vld.description: The Translated Sound Agg data is aggregated to elimanate duplicates into Sound Valid
